hero.subheadline: AI-powered meal plans built around your body, goals, and taste.

features.headline: Nutrition that works for your life
features.subheadline: Whether you're looking to lose weight, build muscle, or simply eat more mindfully — Wondish gives you the tools to succeed.
features.smartMealPlanningDesc: Get a personalized weekly meal plan based on your caloric needs, dietary restrictions, and taste preferences. Updated automatically.
features.healthGoalTrackingDesc: Track your weight, BMI, energy levels, and mood over time. Visualize your progress with beautiful charts and journey dashboards.
features.customDishPreferencesDesc: Tell us what you love, what you avoid, and your allergies. We'll build a plan around your unique palate — no unwanted surprises.
features.customIngredientsDesc: Add your own ingredients with exact nutritional values. Build recipes tailored to your kitchen and local grocery store.
features.nutritionAnalyticsDesc: Get detailed breakdowns of your macro and micronutrient intake. Understand the science behind your meals with clarity.
features.weightLossPlansDesc: Curated low-calorie meal programs designed for healthy, sustainable weight loss — included in the free plan.

predictionTeaser.headline: See exactly how long it takes to reach your goal
predictionTeaser.subheadline: Enter your current weight, goal weight, and weekly target. Wondish tells you the exact number of days — and builds your meal plan to get there.
predictionTeaser.cardSubtext: to reach your goal weight — based on your profile
predictionTeaser.sampleText: Sample prediction · Sign up to see yours

howItWorks.headline: Up and running in minutes
howItWorks.step1Desc: Tell us about your health goals, dietary restrictions, allergies, and food preferences. Takes less than 3 minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Receive a personalized weekly plan with recipes tailored to your caloric needs and tastes — curated by nutritionists.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Log meals, mood, weight, and energy. Watch your health improve week over week with our analytics dashboard.

pricing.headline: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subheadline: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees.
pricing.freeTagline: Start your nutrition journey at no cost.
pricing.footer: No credit card required for the free plan · Cancel premium anytime · Secure billing via Stripe

cta.headline: Ready to eat better, feel better?
cta.stat: Average member loses 8.2 lbs in their first month.
cta.subheadline: Join thousands of people building healthier habits with Wondish. Your first 14 days are completely free.

footer.tagline: Personalized nutrition and meal planning for a healthier life.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successSubtitle: If an account exists for {email}, we've sent a password reset link.

dashboardHeader.enterCoupon: Enter a coupon code to unlock access.

overview.snapshot: Here's your health snapshot for today.
overview.upgradeDesc: Upgrade to Premium for custom ingredients, full journey analytics, and priority support. First 14 days free.
